layout.title: FerroScale
layout.description: Metal weight and price calculator for EN standard and custom profiles. Accurate estimates with traceable formulas.
layout.openGraphDescription: Calculate weight and price for EN profile types with traceable formulas and references.

settings.title: Settings - FerroScale
settings.description: Adjust calculator defaults and preferences in FerroScale.

contact.title: Contact - FerroScale
contact.description: Send a report or get in touch about FerroScale.

loading.title: Loading workspace
loading.subtitle: Preparing your calculator, projects, and live results.

pwa.offlineBanner: Offline mode active. You can continue calculations with cached data.
pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of the app is available.
pwa.readyForOffline: App is ready for offline use.
pwa.installBody: Add the app to your home screen or desktop — it opens instantly and works offline.

query.placeholderExample: type a profile... e.g. hea120 6m x2 s235

settings.applyAcrossCommand: Pricing, grade, and unit settings apply across Command.
settings.inlinePriceHint: Override the default rate with {example}; on mobile, type the number then tap the rate key.
settings.subtitle: pricing · units · appearance

docs.label: Guide
docs.title: How to use FerroScale
docs.subtitle: A compact reference for Command, pricing, saved work, projects, sync, and mobile shortcuts.

command.title: Fast command input
command.body: Start with a profile and size, then add length, quantity, and grade in any order.

tips.example: Try: hea120 6m x2 s235, upn100 4.5m, or round 20 2m.
tips.fallback: If you type a bare length like 6, FerroScale uses the fallback length unit from Settings.
tips.chips: Tap chips to edit or remove them; suggestions complete profiles, sizes, length, quantity, and saving.

profiles.title: Profiles and materials
profiles.body: EN standard profiles use built-in sizes; manual shapes use the dimensions you enter.

tips.grade: Pick a default grade in Settings so quick calculations start with the material you use most.
tips.aliases: Use profile suggestions when you are unsure of the exact alias.
tips.trace: The result keeps geometry, density, and pricing together for traceable estimates.

pricing.title: Pricing overrides
pricing.body: Settings define the default currency, unit price, price basis, waste, and VAT. A command can override the rate for just that calculation.

tips.mobile: Mobile: type the rate number, then tap the rate key such as €/kg to insert the unit token.
tips.basis: Set Price basis to Weight when your supplier quotes per kilogram.

library.title: Saved, compare, and projects
library.body: Save repeat calculations, compare alternatives side by side, and collect items into project totals.

tips.save: Save logs the calculation to Library and the desktop session tape.
tips.compare: Compare shows weight, cost, and surface deltas against the base item.
tips.projects: + Project adds the current calculation to a job collection with running totals.

sync.title: Sync and offline
sync.body: FerroScale works offline after install and can sync saved data through Google Drive.

tips.passphrase: Use the same sync passphrase on each device; it encrypts data before upload.
tips.included: Saved entries, compare items, projects, and presets are included in sync.
tips.offline: The app keeps cached calculator data available when the network drops.

sync.passphrasePrompt: Enter a sync passphrase. Use the same passphrase on every device — it is used to end-to-end encrypt your data before it is stored on Google Drive.
sync.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Google Drive sync on this device?
sync.title: Sync
sync.description: Sync your saved entries, projects, compare, and presets to Google Drive — end-to-end encrypted with your own passphrase.

library.emptyProjects: No projects yet. Create one above, or tap + Project on a result.
library.noProjectsCreateAbove: No projects yet. Create one above to get started.

validation.nameRange: Name must be between 2 and 80 characters.
validation.messageRange: Message must be between 10 and 1500 characters.

qa.title: Formula QA
qa.subtitle: Live engine output checked against independent references — published EN catalog masses and hand-computed formulas (S235JR, per metre).
qa.note: Reference values are deliberately independent of the app's datasets: standard profiles use published catalog masses, manual profiles use hand-computed cross-section formulas. The same checks run in CI on every change.
